'''Sith Elite Warbot''' were a type of [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droid]] produced by the ancient [[Sith (species)/Legends|Sith]].

==Overview==
Though known as warbots, these [[Droid/Legends|droids]] were not exclusively used for battle and were, in fact, more commonly used as high-security forces. Many important officials within the Sith Empire were known to retain their use and felt more comfortable knowing that a pair of Elite Warbots guarded their chambers instead of a dozen organic guards.<ref name="TSC">{{GamerCite|5|The Sith Compendium}}</ref> Despite that being the case, within the Sith army, they were notable for being powerful combatants.<ref name="TG">''[[Threats of the Galaxy]]''</ref> They were highly effective and quite proficient in both melee as well as ranged combat. In addition, it was known that they were not too widely used by the Empire due to the expense involved in constructing them.<ref name="TSC" />

The Sith had constructed various different models of these warbots with each being armored and typically armed with a pair of [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]]. Its main weapon was, however, an [[Sith alchemy/Legends|alchemically]] treated [[Sith sword]] which was able to combat [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]] as well as deflect blaster shots.<ref name="TG" /> One variant were equipped with [[Stun blaster/Legends|stun blasters]] and batons rather than Sith [[Sword/Legends|sword]]. These versions were typically used for training exercises but despite their less lethal armaments, they were not reprogrammed to behave any differently compared to more militant models which made them harsh teachers during such sessions.<ref name="TSC" />

==History==
These droids were originally developed in the year [[5000 BBY/Legends|5000 BBY]] and were in use by the [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]]. They were used extensively when the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]], [[Naga Sadow/Legends|Naga Sadow]], led his people into the [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|Great Hyperspace War]] against the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Many of these [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] tainted droids were destroyed during that conflict though some managed to survive or were deactivated or placed into hiding. These droids would later resurface in other conflicts long after the destruction of the Sith Empire. This included the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]] and the [[Jedi Civil War]] though most Sith Elite Warbots resided within the tombs of [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]] as well as similar such locations throughout the [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxy]].<ref name="TG" /> Some were used by the [[Naddist]]s during the [[Freedon Nadd Uprising|Naddist Uprising]] on [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]], tall and black, with armor resembling that of [[Warb Null]].

By the more modern age, these battle droids were a rare sight though were encountered by explorers and collectors who stumbled on these long forgotten warbots.<ref name="TG" />
